description: Zoho MCP is a Zoho service for creating Model Context Protocol servers that expose tools from Zoho and third-party services to AI agents. It lets users connect MCP clients and authorize tool actions so agents can carry out workflows across configured apps.
summary: zohomcp.ca exposes a Zoho MCP server surface via https://mcp.zoho.com, authenticated with Zoho account OAuth-style authorization handled by the MCP client; no separate public REST, GraphQL, or CLI surface was found for this domain.
